raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/2023, XXXX day I booked a package trip for XXXX to XXXX XXXX XXXX from XXXX. I used my Citibank credit card. Our travel dates were for XX/XX/XXXX returning XXXX XXXX. Total cost of our trip {$7800.00}. Immediately after booking my reservation my husband had a XXXX XXXX and was instructed to not fly for the next 90 days. It was less than 24 hours from the time we booked. it was not clear our hotel XXXX XXXX was nonrefundable. All the information said full refund if canceled within 24 hours. I contacted XXXX and was only refunded the air fare portion of the trip. I did not get a refund for the hotel which is the cost of {$5500.00}. I called XXXX 7-10 times, explained our situation to numerous agents and supervisors and was told to call XXXX XXXX XXXX I called XXXX many times and was told to call XXXX. I was shuffled between XXXX & XXXX with no solution. I then disputed the transaction with my credit card company but after 6 months they took XXXX side. I even asked for a voucher on a future trip rather than a refund but unfortunately no one will work with me. It is morally wrong to take {$5500.00} from someone due to health issues. I understand the Non refund policy which was not clear in the booking website, but they can issue a credit towards a future trip. Your assistance is appreciated. Thank you
